title: Marvel Avengers 8 Piece Set Eraser Captain America Hulk Widow Thor Iron Man
description:
Does your child love the Avengers? This set of officially licensed Marvel erasers comes with 8 different erasers featuring characters from the hit Avengers franchise including Captain America, The Incredible Hulk, Thor, Iron Man, and more! This eraser pack is a great school supply set for kids who love to show off their favorite superheroes to their friends. Each eraser features vibrant and colorful graphics for a unique eraser option. These compact erasers will easily fit inside just about any school bag, backpack, or pencil pouch so kids can correct mistakes on their homework, art projects, and more on the go. All of the erasers included are safe for children ages 4 and up with adult supervision

  • COMPACT SIZE - Small erasers will easily fit inside just about any backpack, school bag, or pencil pouch; homework, art projects, and more on-the-go
  • SAFE FOR KIDS - All erasers included are safe for children ages 4 and up with adult supervision; Choking hazard (small parts)
  • SPECIFICATIONS - Officially licensed Marvel (Avengers); Colors: assorted; Recommended age: 4+ years; Number of pieces included: 8 erasers
